en: How was that? Freddy? Higher. Can you go a bit higher?
ko: 어땠어? 프레디? 더 높이. 좀 더 높일 수 있어?

en: If I go any higher, only dogs will hear me. Try. Freddy's note, sorry. Go on, roll the tape.
ko: 더 높이면 개들만 들을 거야. 해봐. 프레디의 음, 미안. 계속해, 테이프 돌려.

en: Jesus, how many more Galileos do you want?
ko: 제발, 갈릴레오 몇 개 더 필요해?

en: Freddy wants to do a few more overdubs. Do we even have any tape left?
ko: 프레디가 몇 개 더 더빙하고 싶대. 테이프 남아있어?

en: I do have to say, the tape is wearing out. It can't take much more.
ko: 테이프가 닳아가고 있어. 더는 못 버텨.

en: Yeah, we can't afford much more.
We're already three weeks over schedule.
Dub 26 of Fred's thing. One more, one more.
ko: 프레디의 26번 더빙. 하나 더, 하나 더.

en: My nuts feel like they're in my chest right now. Are we done? That's it.
ko: 지금 내 고환이 가슴에 있는 것 같아. 끝났어? 그게 다야.
